channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Three dead, including a child, after explosion and massive fire at Dallas apartment complex
item.description: The fire started around 1 p.m. local time and escalated to a fire-alarm fire, according to authorities.

item.title: Bondi to testify behind closed doors in House Epstein probe today
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi will testify before the House Oversight Committee on Friday about her handling of the Epstein files.

item.title: Death toll from U.S. boat strikes climbs after survivors not found
item.description: The death toll from the Trump administration's strikes on suspected drug trafficking boats has risen to at least 199.

item.title: Pam Bondi to face closed-door questioning from House lawmakers over Epstein files
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi is appearing before House lawmakers investigating Jeffrey Epstein's sexual abuse cases.
